message:
feat(tests): add comprehensive E2E error handling tests (beads_rust-5y9e)

Add structured error tests for:
- INVALID_TYPE error code with hint validation
- INVALID_PRIORITY error code with hint validation
- --no-color mode output (no ANSI escape codes)
- Text vs JSON mode exit code parity
- Exit code category validation (2=db, 3=issue, 4=validation, 5=dep)
- Multiple validation errors same exit code

All 94 e2e_errors tests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
